description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, partially covered porch area. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or taupe color, complemented by large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The porch features a slatted privacy screen and is adorned with potted plants and outdoor furniture, creating a welcoming outdoor living space. The building has a compact, rectangular footprint with a clear separation between indoor and outdoor zones. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious blend with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious, partially covered porch featuring outdoor furniture and greenery. The exterior is finished in light beige tones with an asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: This view shows the main entrance, a large window, and part of the interior layout, with the porch and outdoor area visible to the right.
description_view_1: The front of the bungalow is visible here, highlighting the covered porch, outdoor seating, and lush greenery, as well as the main glass doors and windows.
description_view_2: This side view reveals the depth of the building, the privacy screen on the porch, and a cluster of grouped windows on the side wall.
description_view_3: The rear of the bungalow is shown, with minimal windows and a more solid wall, emphasizing privacy and the separation from the outdoor living area.
